globals.description: Mesh factory namespace. Create mesh entities (cube, plane).
globals.name: mesh

globals.description: Line factory namespace. Create line strips (manual push) or traces (Signal-driven).
globals.name: line

globals.description: Scene management namespace. Add/remove entities for rendering.
globals.name: scene

globals.description: Logging namespace. Use for non-fatal debugging output.
globals.name: log

globals.description: Debug namespace. Emit debug signals in analysis mode.
globals.name: dbg

globals.description: Signal generator namespace (beat-synced oscillators and noise).
globals.name: gen

globals.description: Signal accessors namespace (Signal graphs). Available in both `init()` and `update()`.
globals.name: inputs

globals.description: Host-assisted introspection. `describe(x)` returns a structured description of a value/type.
globals.name: describe

globals.description: Human-readable help. `help(x)` returns a short formatted summary.
globals.name: help

globals.description: Targeted documentation lookup. `doc("Type.member")` returns structured docs.
globals.name: doc

globals.description: Frame feedback namespace. Create Milkdrop-style temporal visual effects (trails, warping).
globals.name: feedback

globals.description: Post-processing effect factory. Create composable visual effects (bloom, color grading, vignette, distortion).
globals.name: fx

globals.description: Post-processing chain management. Add/remove/reorder effects in the render pipeline.
globals.name: post

globals.description: Scene camera controls. Position, rotation, projection with signal support for audio-reactive camera motion.
globals.name: camera

types.description: A mesh entity created by `mesh.cube()` or `mesh.plane()`.
types.name: MeshEntity

properties.description: Material parameters map. Keys depend on the selected material.
properties.name: params

types.description: A procedural line strip created by `line.strip(options)`.

methods.description: Add a 2D point to the strip.
methods.name: push
methods.notes: Points are stored in a ring buffer (oldest points are overwritten when full).

methods.description: Clear all points from the strip.
methods.name: clear

types.name: LineStripEntity

types.description: Line factory namespace. Create procedural line strips and Signal-driven traces.

methods.description: Create a procedural line strip with manual push() control.
methods.name: strip
methods.notes: Defaults: max_points=256, mode="line".

methods.description: Create a Signal-driven line that automatically plots values over time.
methods.name: trace
methods.notes: Plots (time * x_scale, (value + y_offset) * y_scale) each frame. No update() code needed.

params.description: The Signal to trace. Evaluated each frame.
params.name: signal

params.description: Options map (max_points, mode, x_scale, y_scale, y_offset).
params.name: options

types.name: Line

properties.description: Offset added to value before scaling (default: 0.0).
properties.name: y_offset

types.description: A Signal-driven line created by `line.trace(signal, options)`.

methods.description: Clear all points from the trace.
methods.name: clear

types.name: LineTraceEntity

properties.description: RGBA color (0.0-1.0 range). Channels can be Signals.
properties.name: color

methods.description: Add an entity to the render list.
methods.name: add

methods.description: Remove an entity from the render list.
methods.name: remove
info
methods.notes: Log volume is limited per frame.

methods.name: warn
methods.notes: Log volume is limited per frame.

methods.name: error
methods.notes: Log volume is limited per frame.

methods.description: Emit a named debug signal value (analysis mode only).
methods.name: emit
methods.notes: In playback mode this is a no-op.

methods.description: Get detailed information about a material.
methods.name: describeMaterial
methods.notes: Returns {name, blend_mode, params: [{name, type}]}.

methods.description: List all available post-processing effect IDs.
methods.name: listEffects

methods.description: Get detailed information about a post-processing effect.
methods.name: describeEffect
methods.notes: Returns {name, description, params: [{name, type, description}]}.

methods.description: Linear blend between this signal and another.
methods.name: mix

methods.description: Attach a debug probe to emit values during host evaluation.
methods.name: probe
methods.notes: Use with analysis mode / host evaluation; this does not print.

methods.description: Apply a logistic sigmoid curve (centered at 0.5).
methods.name: sigmoid
methods.notes: Normalize or clamp to 0-1 first for predictable results.

methods.description: Cumulative sum with optional decay (in beats).
methods.name: integrate

methods.description: Delay the signal by N beats.
methods.name: delay

methods.description: Look ahead by N beats (input signals only).
methods.name: anticipate
methods.notes: For derived signals this may be a no-op.

methods.description: Moving average over a window of N beats.
methods.name: moving_average

methods.description: Gaussian blur with sigma in beats.
methods.name: gaussian

methods.description: Map to a custom output range.
methods.name: to_range

params.description: Must drop below to turn off.
params.name: off_threshold

properties.description: Minimum time between events in beats. Default: 0.25.
properties.name: hysteresis_beats

properties.description: How to assign event weights. Default: peak_height.
properties.name: weight_mode

properties.description: If weight_mode is integrated_energy, integration window in beats. Default: 0.25.
properties.name: energy_window_beats

methods.description: Extract an EventStream from a Signal using peak-picking.
methods.name: events
methods.notes: In playback mode, this may return an empty stream.

properties.description: Phase within beat if available, else 0.0.
properties.name: beat_phase

properties.description: ADSR sustain time in beats. Default: 0.5.
properties.name: sustain_beats

properties.description: How to combine overlapping envelopes. Default: "sum".
properties.name: overlap_mode

properties.description: Group nearby events before shaping. Default: null.
properties.name: group_within_beats

properties.description: How to merge grouped events. Default: "sum".
properties.name: merge_mode

types.description: An immutable, time-ordered stream of events.

methods.description: True if there are no events.
methods.name: is_empty

methods.description: Get an event by index (or () if out of range).
methods.name: get

methods.description: Convert to an array for iteration.
methods.name: to_array

methods.description: Convert events to an impulse Signal.
methods.name: to_signal

methods.description: Convert events to a shaped Signal.
methods.example: let env = events.to_signal(#{ envelope: "attack_decay", attack_beats: 0.05, decay_beats: 0.5 });
methods.name: to_signal

methods.description: Filter events to a time range [start, end).
methods.name: filter_time

methods.description: Limit to the first N events.
methods.name: limit

methods.description: Convert to signal and attach a debug probe for analysis visualization.
methods.name: probe
methods.notes: Returns a Signal, not EventStream. Use to visualize events in the debug UI.

params.description: Probe name shown in debug UI.
params.name: name

types.name: EventStream

methods.description: Sine wave oscillator synced to beats.
methods.name: sin

methods.description: Triangle wave oscillator synced to beats.
methods.name: triangle

types.description: Global signal accessors namespace. Properties return `Signal` objects.
types.name: InputsSignals

types.description: Signals available for a specific band key.
types.name: BandSignals

types.description: Frame feedback namespace for Milkdrop-style temporal visual effects.

methods.description: Create a new feedback configuration builder.
methods.name: builder

methods.description: Check if feedback is currently enabled.
methods.name: is_enabled

types.name: Feedback

types.description: Scene camera with signal-bindable properties. Position, rotation, projection parameters can all be driven by Signals for audio-reactive camera motion.

methods.description: Set the camera to look at a target position. Enables LookAt mode.
methods.name: lookAt

methods.description: Position camera on circular orbit around a center point. Sets both position and target.
methods.name: orbit

methods.description: Move camera forward/backward along view direction.
methods.name: dolly

types.name: Camera

properties.description: Camera position in world space. Each component (x, y, z) accepts numbers or Signals.
properties.name: position

properties.description: Camera rotation in Euler angles (pitch, yaw, roll) in radians. Used in Euler mode (when target is not set).
properties.name: rotation

properties.description: Look-at target position. Set to enable LookAt mode (camera orientation derived automatically). Set to () for Euler mode.
properties.name: target

properties.description: Up vector for LookAt mode. Defaults to Y-up (0, 1, 0).
properties.name: up

properties.description: Field of view in degrees. Default: 45.
properties.name: fov

methods.name: opacity
methods.notes: Default is 0.8.

methods.description: Add a spiral warp (rotation + radial scaling).
methods.name: spiral
methods.notes: Scale defaults to 1.0.

methods.description: Add a spiral warp with custom scale.
methods.name: spiral

methods.description: Add a radial warp (expand/contract from center).
methods.name: radial

methods.description: Add a radial warp with custom scale.
methods.name: radial

methods.description: Add an affine warp with translation.
methods.name: affine

methods.description: Add a decay effect (fade to black).
methods.name: decay

methods.description: Add a posterize effect (reduce color levels).
methods.name: posterize

methods.description: Add a channel offset effect (RGB split).
methods.name: channel_offset

types.description: Material parameters map. Keys and types depend on the selected material.
types.name: MaterialParams

methods.description: Create a bloom effect (glow on bright areas).
methods.name: bloom
methods.notes: Parameters: threshold (0-1), intensity (0-1), radius (px).

methods.name: colorGrade
methods.notes: Parameters: brightness, contrast, saturation, gamma, tint.

methods.name: vignette
methods.notes: Parameters: intensity (0-1), smoothness (0-1), color.

methods.name: distortion
methods.notes: Parameters: amount (-1 to 1), center {x, y}.

methods.description: Add an effect to the post-processing chain.
methods.name: add

methods.description: Remove an effect from the post-processing chain.
methods.name: remove

methods.description: Clear all effects from the chain.
methods.name: clear

types.description: A post-processing effect instance. Properties can be modified dynamically.
types.name: PostEffect
